cases.title: Exact keyword hits the fact

seed.statement: Reload nginx after editing a config: docker exec nginx nginx -s reload (test first with nginx -t).
Redis runs on host port 6380, no password by default.
In Yii2 use with(['relation']) to avoid N+1 on list queries.

turns.prompt: reload nginx after editing the site config

cases.note: Baseline: an exact keyword ('nginx') and a command cue both point at the same fact; unrelated facts must stay silent.
